title: Iran's Houthi allies declare maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia, escalating threat to oil market
summary_full: The militants, in a statement carried by state news, accused the Saudis of laying an "aggressive siege" against them.
summary_public: The militants, in a statement carried by state news, accused the Saudis of laying an "aggressive siege" against them.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran's Houthi allies declare maritime embargo against Saudi Arabia
